---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for aTerm
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What is the problem you are trying to solve? Describe the limitation or friction in the current experience, not the solution.

## Proposed solution

How would you like to see this addressed in aTerm? Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives considered

Are there other ways to solve this problem? Why do you prefer your proposed solution?

## Context

Is this related to a specific workflow (e.g. terminal emulation, AI provider, MCP, agent tabs, theming)? Any prior art in other terminal emulators or tools that handles this well?
